hero.title: Hello, I am Xavier Nouaille, fullstack developer based on Paris
hero.paragraph: A 22-year-old full stack developer based in the Paris region with three years of experience, I specialize in Javascript/Typescript programming languages, with React for the front-end and Node.js for the back-end.

about.title: About
paragraphs: Hello! My name is Xavier Nouaille and I am a full stack developer. Ever since I discovered the world of programming a few years ago, I knew it was my passion.

I already have three years of experience as a developer, which has allowed me to specialize in the programming languages of Javascript and Typescript. I am proud to say that I have gained extensive experience in creating both front-end and back-end applications, with React for the front-end and Node.js for the back-end. These technologies are my preferred ones, but I am also open to learning new skills.

Passionate and meticulous, I am always on the lookout for interesting projects to work on. I enjoy working in a team and sharing my knowledge with my colleagues to build quality projects. I also have an excellent adaptability and can easily adjust to different work environments. In my free time, I like to stay up-to-date with the latest technological advancements by doing technology watch.
about.modalText: For more than a year now, I have been supporting companies in their digitalization by developing websites, redesigning them, developing custom plugins, etc...

items.title: FullStack developer
description: Development of micro-services used within the company
Front-end development with ReactJS & NextJS, back-end with NodeJS, Koa. GraphQL & REST APIs. MongoDB NoSQL database
Migrating services to a mono-repo structure
Collaboration with a team of 5 to 10 developers.

contact.title: Let's get in touch
contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.paragraph: A project, a question? Do not hesitate to contact me, I will provide you with my response as soon as possible.
